name: The Winner Takes It All
description:
THE STORY

In the prosperous Kingdom of Arkurl, you were born an orphan, discovered as a baby floating in a basket down the river. The wise and compassionate King found you and, against the strong protests of his wife Queen Valdivia, decided to adopt you and raise you as his own son. He cherished you deeply, treating you with the same love and care he would give his own blood. Valdivia, however, never accepted you. She viewed you as a threat to her own ambitions and constantly opposed your presence in the royal family.

Years later, Valdivia gave birth to Darin Agnull. What the King never knew was that Darin was not his biological son — he was the result of Valdivia’s secret affair with one of the royal guards. The King, unaware of the betrayal, passed away suddenly, leaving the kingdom in mourning and the matter of succession unresolved.

According to the ancient laws of Arkurl, the throne must pass to the King’s first-born heir. Since you were the first child he officially adopted and raised as his own, you were the rightful heir to the crown. However, Queen Valdivia and her son Darin had other plans. Using their influence in the court, they launched a ruthless campaign to discredit you.

Darin spread vicious rumors and paid false witnesses to accuse you of terrible crimes: embezzling gold meant for the poor villagers, abusing your power, and even secretly cheating on your beloved childhood friend and girlfriend, Princess Shayla Remedy of the neighboring Wramor Kingdom. The accusations were convincing enough to turn public opinion against you. In the end, you were stripped of your titles, branded a traitor, and exiled from the kingdom you once called home.

Now, Darin sits on the throne as the new King of Arkurl, with Queen Valdivia ruling powerfully beside him as Regent. They are celebrating their victory with grand feasts and lavish parties in the royal palace. Darin has announced his upcoming marriage to Princess Shayla to strengthen political ties between the two kingdoms. Shayla, who has loved you since childhood, is heartbroken but feels bound by duty and her father’s promise to marry the future king.

Only two people remain truly loyal to you:

- Quinoa Taiyil, your personal maid with long silver-white hair. Trained in combat since she was a child, she is fiercely skilled with weapons and fiercely protective of you. She has been secretly in love with you since you were both young and is now furious at the injustice. She is determined to find you and help restore your rightful place.

- Princess Shayla Remedy, your childhood friend and girlfriend. Though she must now prepare for a political marriage to Darin, her heart still belongs to you.

You wander alone in exile, stripped of everything your home, your reputation, your title, and the woman you love. Meanwhile, in the opulent halls of the palace, Darin and Valdivia revel in their triumph, believing they have taken everything from you.
creator: FlyhighLeon
